sections.heading: Supplementary Information Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations (IMM 5283)
Who needs to fill out this form?
items: This form must be completed by:
Include all factors you wish to have considered. For all the factors, you must provide evidence to support any statements you make on this form.
bullets: your family members, only if they have different humanitarian and compassionate grounds, and they are included in this application.
